accents.rendered_excerpt: You are allowed to set a boundary at work that feels uncomfortable for exactly twelve seconds. ---  Take that recognition into the integration that follows.
You are allowed to mute the group chat. The group will survive your silence. ---  Take that recognition into the integration that follows.
